name: feature_campaign
description: Interactive, resumable campaign for complex feature work: design and DAG planning checkpoints, dependency-ordered file-disjoint implementation waves, fail-soft integration, profile-driven real-system checks, and final verification. Leaves a verified local branch and never pushes or opens a PR.

inputParameters.prompt:
Design this feature in ${workflow.input.designDir}. Explore the repository, write or revise coherent design documents, and explicitly cover architecture, interfaces, rollout, tests, and unresolved risks. Reconcile any direct worktree edits. Instruction: ${workflow.input.instruction}
Checkpoint feedback: ${workflow.variables.feedback}

inputParameters.feedback: Review these requested check results and update the design if needed: ${design_checks.output}
Design revision limit reached; resume with a higher designMaxRevisions value.

inputParameters.prompt:
Read the approved design and repository, then produce a dependency DAG for the requested feature. Return JSON tasks with exactly: id, description, dependsOn, files, acceptanceCriteria, checks. Tasks ready in one wave must have disjoint files. At most ${workflow.input.maxTasks} tasks. Instruction: ${workflow.input.instruction}
Checkpoint feedback: ${workflow.variables.feedback}

inputParameters.feedback: Review these requested check results and revise the plan if needed: ${plan_checks.output}

inputParameters.message: feature campaign: approved plan and adopted edits

inputParameters.feedback: Planning revision limit reached; resume with a higher planMaxRevisions value.

inputParameters.queryExpression: {completed: ((.completed + .added) | unique), sessions: (.sessions + .newSessions), remaining: ([.remaining[] | select(. as $id | ((.completed + .added) | index($id) | not))]), waves: ((.waves + [.wave]) | unique)}

inputParameters.prompt:
Review integrated campaign wave ${workflow.variables.wave} against the approved design, DAG acceptance criteria, and check results. Identify blocking correctness issues, conflicts, or missing work. Do not edit. Integration: ${integrate_wave.output}
Checks: ${wave_checks.output}

Reconcile the manual edits currently in this campaign worktree with the approved design and DAG. Preserve intentional edits, fix inconsistencies, and run focused checks. Do not commit or push. Operator note: ${wave_decision.output.feedback}

inputParameters.message: feature campaign: adopt manual wave edits

inputParameters.feedback: Manual edits reconciled; repeat integration review and checks: ${adopt_wave_edits.output.result}

inputParameters.prompt: Apply the operator's corrective wave feedback to the integrated worktree, reconcile it with the approved design and DAG, and run focused checks. Do not commit or push. Feedback: ${wave_decision.output.feedback}

inputParameters.feedback: Corrective pass completed; repeat integration review and checks: ${revise_wave_work.output.result}
Run and review the explicitly requested checks before approval.
Profiles changed; reconcile and re-run checks.
Implementation wave limit reached with DAG tasks remaining.

inputParameters.prompt:
Perform final real-system verification of this campaign against the instruction, approved design, DAG acceptance criteria, and current repository. Reconcile direct worktree edits and fix any actionable issue from checkpoint feedback, then report remaining findings. Do not commit or push. Instruction: ${workflow.input.instruction}
Feedback: ${workflow.variables.feedback}

inputParameters.feedback: Run and review the explicitly requested final checks.
